action.reasoning: Observation: best_v2.pt (test AP 0.2136) has correct regular weights. best_v5.pt saved broken EMA weights (test AP 0.038). model.py is truncated and may have forward pass bugs. BatchNorm error only in training mode, not eval. Time remaining ~18 min. Analysis: Must write complete, correct model.py that loads best_v2.pt, then submit eval immediately. No time to retrain. Decision: Write complete model.py, verify it loads best_v2.pt, submit eval with best_v2.pt.
action.command: python -c "from model import GINEVirtualNode; import torch; ckpt=torch.load('checkpoints/best_v2.pt', map_location='cpu', weights_only=False); print('Keys:', list(ckpt.keys())); sd=ckpt['model_state_dict']; print('hidden_dim:', ckpt.get('hidden_dim')); print('num_layers:', ckpt.get('num_layers')); print('use_jk:', ckpt.get('use_jk')); model=GINEVirtualNode(hidden_dim=ckpt['hidden_dim'], num_layers=ckpt['num_layers'], dropout=ckpt.get('dropout',0.3), use_jk=ckpt['use_jk'], encoding_type='linear'); missing,unexpected=model.load_state_dict(sd, strict=False); print('missing:', len(missing), 'unexpected:', len(unexpected)); print('Model loads OK')"
